title: Powers in Sub-part not limitations
doc_html:
§891.  Powers in Sub-part not limitations

The provisions of this Sub-part enumerating powers and duties of parishes and their governing authorities are not limitations on the general powers or duties of parishes or the governing authorities thereof.
